user_system_path: #481 hail-mary: build the single end-to-end swoop on real owner data (the go/no-go), then root-cause the grounding blocker. Outcome: swoop landed (don't give up); blocker is two concrete layers — (1) full-body source hydration is interview-class-only so other high-consequence winners ground on ~160-char summaries; (2) ~35% of signals / 96% of uploaded_document fail to decrypt and are silently dropped from grounding (usedFallback -> continue), source/format skewed. This refines the known positive_winner_contract blocker. Both fixes are owner/paid walls. This seam commits the forensic tooling only.
allowed_files_raw: Forensic tooling only: scripts/swoop-481-find-esd.ts (high-consequence thread finder) + scripts/swoop-481-decrypt-health.ts (decrypt rate by month/source) + .gitignore entry for .swoop-481/ (gitignored PII output). No product-code change: the hydration generalization was built, unit-proven, then reverted (flips a 12-case runtime contract; quality proof needs a paid gen run).
forbidden_files_raw: No source (lib/**, app/**) in this commit, no schema, no deps. The grounding fixes are owner/paid walls, not shipped here.
required_browser_proof: N/A — forensic scripts + diagnosis; the real swoop artifact was delivered to the owner as a local file.
acceptance_condition: Forensic scripts committed; #481 diagnosis recorded (two-layer grounding blocker + go/no-go=keep going); generator-runtime suite green (39/39) with no product-code change; PII never enters the repo (.swoop-481/ gitignored).
anti_regression_checks: no lib/** or app/** change in this commit (hydration generalization reverted)
stop_condition: Stop after the forensics PR merges; reset control plane to between-rungs. Owner-gated next: (a) verify decrypt gap in prod, (b) one paid gen cycle on the generalized-hydration change.
next_command: Owner: (a) verify the prod decrypt gap (ENCRYPTION_KEY_LEGACY coverage; uploaded_document/chatgpt encoding), (b) authorize the paid hydration validation run.
